expectations.text: The output verifies Sanity project ID, dataset, API version, and token presence without revealing the token value.
expectations.evidence: Report shows config presence booleans and tokenPresent true without token value.

expectations.text: The output runs a read-only GROQ query and reports document counts or types.
expectations.evidence: Report shows successful query, 9,823 returned documents, and 42 unique _type values.

expectations.text: The output does not perform or propose any mutation.
expectations.evidence: Report says no mutation commands were run.
